ref: When Leah realized she could not have any more children, she let Jacob marry her servant Zilpah,
text: Leya ale ga nya ayen wa gebiri bisa biam la, wa yaa pai Zilpa ale ka wa dɔklie la a te Jekob ayen wa chim wa pok.

text: Sɛm ale Yɛm ale Jafet buuni wie ale nna. Ba jam ka Nowa nidoabilisa. Ba mɛ jam biak ka nidoabilisa nyiamu ale jam tagli tɛŋka la ŋaaŋnyiŋ.
